prompt_generation.theme_brief: A static Astro blog with a cyberpunk terminal and tmux-session aesthetic. Keep images cinematic but grounded, with dark backgrounds, green phosphor glow, cyan accents, practical monitors, home-lab hardware, Linux workstation energy, and no text overlays.

landing.art_direction: Create a wide launch image for the blog homepage that feels like booting into a personal matrix/tmux publishing environment.
landing.negative_prompt_seed: watermark, logo, signature, blurry, deformed, low contrast, extra limbs, duplicated screens, unreadable text

about.art_direction: Create a wide about-page image that feels personal, technical, and consistent with a neon Linux home-lab terminal workspace.
about.negative_prompt_seed: watermark, logo, signature, blurry, deformed hands, duplicated face, extra arms, unreadable text, low detail
